title: Blue Jasmine
creator: Woody Allen
description: A former New York socialite tries to rebuild her life after everything falls apart.
whyForActors: Sharp, elegant, and emotionally charged — a portrait of identity under pressure.

title: All About Eve
creator: Joseph L. Mankiewicz
description: An ambitious young woman enters the orbit of a celebrated theatre star.
whyForActors: Witty, theatrical, and deliciously observant about ambition and performance.

title: A Woman Under the Influence
creator: John Cassavetes
description: A woman’s inner world strains against the expectations of family and marriage.

title: Manchester by the Sea
creator: Kenneth Lonergan
description: A man returns home after a family tragedy and is forced to face his past.
whyForActors: Quiet, devastating, and full of emotional restraint.

title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
creator: Céline Sciamma
description: An artist is commissioned to paint a young woman’s portrait before her arranged marriage.
whyForActors: A luminous film about looking, longing, and what remains unspoken.
